query_name:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20
    ) > 74129
    THEN (
        SELECT
          AVG(ss_ext_discount_amt)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20
    )
    ELSE (
        SELECT
          AVG(ss_net_paid)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20
    )
  END AS bucket1,
  CASE
    WHEN (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40
    ) > 122840
    THEN (
        SELECT
          AVG(ss_ext_discount_amt)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40
    )
    ELSE (
        SELECT
          AVG(ss_net_paid)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40
    )
  END AS bucket2,
  CASE
    WHEN (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60
    ) > 56580
    THEN (
        SELECT
          AVG(ss_ext_discount_amt)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60
    )
    ELSE (
        SELECT
          AVG(ss_net_paid)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60
    )
  END AS bucket3,
  CASE
    WHEN (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80
    ) > 10097
    THEN (
        SELECT
          AVG(ss_ext_discount_amt)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80
    )
    ELSE (
        SELECT
          AVG(ss_net_paid)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80
    )
  END AS bucket4,
  CASE
    WHEN (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100
    ) > 165306
    THEN (
        SELECT
          AVG(ss_ext_discount_amt)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100
    )
    ELSE (
        SELECT
          AVG(ss_net_paid)
        FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
        WHERE
          ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100
    )
  END AS bucket5
FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/reason/*.parquet') AS reason
WHERE
  r_reason_sk = 1
